_comment: Copy this file to config/users/<username>.json and fill in all fields. Remove all _comment keys before use.

section_targets._comment: min = minimum acceptable papers; do not pad below min with low-quality papers. max = cap per section. title = section header shown in the email.

searches._comment: Each search is dispatched as a parallel PubMed query. Assign a unique single-letter id.
searches.label: <human-readable label for this search>
searches.query: <PubMed query string — do NOT include date filters here; they are appended at runtime>
